description:
In an interview in 1990, Michael Redmond listed this problem as the tesuji that had made the biggest impression on him.  He encountered the position in a game as an amateur 5 dan.  His quote, "I was really happy that book study had paid off."

note: this problem is also in the Guan Zi Pu -- adum
